hero.headline: MAHE Online MBA in Business Analytics: Syllabus, Fees and Career Outcomes
hero.sub: NAAC A++ | NIRF #3 University 2025 | Institution of Eminence | UGC-DEB Approved | Total fees ₹2,92,000

sections.tldr: MAHE Online MBA in Business Analytics covers data visualization, R and Python programming, database management, financial analytics, marketing analytics, and HR analytics. NAAC A++ NIRF #3 University with IoE tag. Total fee ₹2,92,000 (₹73,000/sem). Zero-cost EMI ₹12,167/month. Coursera Plus bundled free. 8 scholarship categories. Work experience required; fresh graduates submit SOP video.

about.body:
MAHE's Online MBA in Business Analytics builds analytics skills across multiple business functions. Semester 3 covers data visualization (dashboard design, Tableau/Power BI concepts, storytelling with data), programming with R and Python (data wrangling, statistical computing, scripting for business problems), and database management (SQL, relational databases, data warehousing concepts, ETL basics). Semester 4 adds financial analytics (credit scoring models, portfolio risk analytics, financial data modelling), marketing analytics (campaign attribution, customer segmentation, CLV modelling, A/B testing), and HR analytics (attrition prediction, workforce planning, recruitment funnel metrics).

The cross-functional analytics approach is a curriculum strength. Instead of focusing narrowly on one domain, MAHE covers analytics applications across finance, marketing, and HR. This makes the programme suitable for professionals targeting analytics roles that span business functions.

MAHE holds NIRF #3 University 2025, NAAC A++, and Institution of Eminence status. Coursera Plus is bundled free, which supplements well with Google Data Analytics and IBM Data Science certificates. At ₹2,92,000, the fee is premium but the NIRF #3 credential and cross-functional analytics depth justify evaluation.

Work experience in reputed organisations is required. Fresh graduates can apply with an SOP video.

EdifyEdu verifies data independently and takes no commission from any university.

syllabus.note: Semesters 1-2 cover the common MBA management core. Semesters 3-4 below show the Business Analytics specialisation subjects.

subjects.name: Management Accounting
subjects.desc: Cost analysis, budgeting, variance analysis, and management decision-making using accounting data.

subjects.name: Legal Aspects of Business
subjects.desc: Contract law, consumer protection, intellectual property, company law basics, and regulatory compliance.

subjects.name: Minor Project
subjects.desc: Applied analytics research project supervised by faculty.

subjects.name: Data Visualization
subjects.desc: Dashboard design principles, Tableau and Power BI concepts, storytelling with data, chart selection frameworks, and interactive report design.

subjects.name: Programming with R and Python
subjects.desc: R for statistical computing, Python for data wrangling (Pandas, NumPy), scripting for business analytics, and automation of data pipelines.

subjects.name: Database Management
subjects.desc: SQL fundamentals, relational database design, data warehousing concepts, ETL basics, and NoSQL introduction.

subjects.name: Entrepreneurship and Innovation
subjects.desc: Startup ideation, business model canvas, lean startup methodology, and funding strategies.

subjects.name: Sustainability
subjects.desc: Sustainable business models, ESG frameworks, and CSR strategy.

subjects.name: Capstone Project
subjects.desc: Analytics capstone integrating Sem 1-4 learning with an industry-linked data problem.

subjects.name: Financial Analytics
subjects.desc: Credit scoring models, portfolio risk analytics, financial data modelling, fraud detection basics, and financial dashboard construction.

subjects.name: Marketing Analytics
subjects.desc: Campaign attribution modelling, customer segmentation (RFM, clustering), CLV estimation, A/B testing design, and marketing mix modelling.

subjects.name: HR Analytics
subjects.desc: Attrition prediction models, workforce planning analytics, recruitment funnel metrics, engagement survey analysis, and people data dashboards.

whoHires.body:
MAHE MBA Business Analytics graduates target roles across analytics, consulting, and data-driven functions:

**Industries:** IT services, BFSI, e-commerce, consulting, FMCG, pharma, telecom, and analytics firms

**Entry-level roles:** Business Analyst, Data Analyst, Analytics Associate, MIS Analyst, Reporting Analyst, Junior Data Scientist

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years experience):** Analytics Manager, Senior Business Analyst, Data Science Lead, Marketing Analytics Manager, Financial Analytics Lead, BI Manager

**Senior roles (7+ years):** Head of Analytics, Chief Data Officer, VP Data Science, Director of Business Intelligence, Analytics Practice Lead

**Employers:** IT firms (TCS Analytics, Infosys BPM, Wipro Analytics), consulting (McKinsey QuantumBlack, Deloitte Analytics, EY Data & Analytics), BFSI (HDFC Bank Analytics, ICICI Analytics), e-commerce (Flipkart, Amazon India), and analytics firms (Mu Sigma, Fractal, LatentView).

**Note:** MAHE provides career support services. Coursera Plus access to Google Data Analytics and IBM certificates supplements placement preparation.

skills.body:
The Business Analytics specialisation builds skills across programming, domain analytics, and data storytelling:

**Technical skills:**
- Programming: R statistical computing, Python data wrangling with Pandas/NumPy, SQL query writing, and data pipeline scripting
- Visualization: Tableau and Power BI dashboard design, chart selection for different data types, and interactive report construction
- Database: relational database design, ETL process understanding, data warehousing concepts, and NoSQL basics
- Statistical Modelling: regression analysis, classification models, clustering, and hypothesis testing

**Applied domain skills:**
- Financial Analytics: credit scoring, portfolio risk metrics, fraud pattern detection, and financial modelling
- Marketing Analytics: RFM segmentation, CLV calculation, A/B test design, campaign attribution, and marketing mix models
- HR Analytics: attrition prediction, workforce planning, and recruitment funnel optimisation

**Soft skills:** Presenting data findings to non-technical stakeholders, framing business problems as analytics questions, and communicating uncertainty and confidence intervals.

comparisons.body:
Comparing MAHE Online MBA Business Analytics against peer programmes:

**vs MUJ Online MBA Analytics & Data Science:** MUJ at approximately ₹1,80,000 on the same platform. MAHE at ₹2,92,000 costs ₹1,12,000 more for the NIRF #3 and IoE brand. Both share similar LMS delivery. MAHE covers analytics across finance, marketing, and HR domains. MUJ is not a downgrade in content quality. The MAHE premium is purely brand-driven.

**vs CU Online MBA Business Analytics:** CU at ₹1,65,000 with NIRF #19 and PwC co-teaching modules. MAHE at ₹2,92,000 costs ₹1,27,000 more. CU's PwC partnership adds industry credibility to analytics content. MAHE wins on NIRF rank but CU offers stronger value for money with industry co-teaching.

**vs Amity Online MBA Business Analytics:** Amity at ₹2,25,000 with NIRF #22 and NAAC A++. MAHE at ₹2,92,000 costs ₹67,000 more but carries NIRF #3 (vs #22). Amity has a larger alumni base. MAHE includes Coursera Plus.

**vs NMIMS Online MBA Operations & Data Sciences:** NMIMS at approximately ₹1,96,000 combines operations with data sciences. MAHE's programme is purely analytics-focused across business functions. For Mumbai-centric analytics careers, NMIMS brand has specific weight.

fees.body:
The MAHE Online MBA in Business Analytics has a total programme fee of ₹2,92,000 inclusive of all taxes.

**Semester-wise fee breakdown:**
- Semester 1: ₹73,000
- Semester 2: ₹73,000
- Semester 3: ₹73,000
- Semester 4: ₹73,000
- **Total: ₹2,92,000**

**Application fee:** ₹500 one-time.

**Zero-cost EMI:** ₹12,167/month directly through the university.

**Scholarships (8 categories):**
- Defence Personnel / Ex-servicemen: 20%
- Divyaang / PwD: 20%
- Merit: 10% (75%+ aggregate)
- MAHE/AGE Alumni: 15%
- SAARC and EWC Nationals: 40%
- Female Learners: 15%
- Doctors: 15%
- Corporate Employees: 15%

**Important:** Learners opting for loan or financing are not eligible for additional discounts or offers.

**Bundled:** Coursera Plus access free with the programme.

Fees listed are indicative. EdifyEdu reconfirms fees with MAHE each quarter. Please reconfirm with our counsellor before any payment.

certificate.body:
Graduates receive an MBA degree certificate with Business Analytics as the specialisation, issued by Manipal Academy of Higher Education (MAHE) under UGC-DEB 2020 online mode standards.

The degree carries NAAC A++ accreditation, NIRF #3 University rank, Institution of Eminence status, and WES recognition. Valid for analytics leadership roles, PSU positions, MNC business intelligence positions, and private-sector data analytics recruitment. DigiLocker issuance is standard.

reviews.intro: Three reviews from MAHE Online MBA Business Analytics students. Ratings reflect individual experience.

items.name: Vikram S.
items.liked: Cross-functional analytics coverage across finance, marketing, and HR. Coursera Plus gave access to Google Data Analytics certificate alongside the MBA
items.disliked: R and Python programming module could go deeper. Students with no coding background may struggle with the pace
items.body: I chose MAHE for the NIRF #3 credential because my target employers (consulting firms) filter on university rank. The cross-functional analytics approach was the selling point. Financial analytics for credit scoring, marketing analytics for segmentation, HR analytics for attrition, all in one programme. Coursera Plus was genuinely useful. I completed the Google Data Analytics certificate alongside Sem 3. The programming depth could be stronger for complete beginners, though.

items.name: Ananya T.
items.liked: Data Visualization and Marketing Analytics subjects were well-structured. Database Management covered SQL in sufficient practical depth
items.disliked: ₹2,92,000 is hard to justify when MUJ offers analytics on the same platform for ₹1,80,000. CU at ₹1,65,000 adds PwC co-teaching
items.body: The analytics curriculum is solid. My concern is purely financial. MUJ offers a similar analytics MBA on the same platform for ₹1,12,000 less. CU adds PwC co-teaching for ₹1,27,000 less. The MAHE brand is strong, but for analytics roles, employers care more about demonstrated skills (GitHub, Kaggle, certifications) than university rank. Unless your employer specifically requires NIRF top-5, consider the alternatives seriously.

items.name: Rohit K.
items.liked: Financial Analytics was directly applicable to my BFSI role. NIRF #3 and IoE cleared credential filters at two banks
items.disliked: Career services were minimal for analytics placement. LMS video quality varied across subjects
items.body: Working in banking analytics, the Financial Analytics and Database Management subjects were immediately applicable. The marketing analytics module on CLV and segmentation expanded my cross-functional understanding. I used the 15% corporate scholarship, which brought costs to around ₹2,48,200. Without that scholarship, I would have chosen CU or MUJ. The LMS experience was adequate but not exceptional. Some lecture videos felt dated.

faqs.question: Does the Business Analytics MBA include programming?
faqs.answer: Yes. Sem 3 includes Programming with R and Python covering data wrangling, statistical computing, and scripting. Students also learn SQL through the Database Management subject.

faqs.question: How does MAHE Business Analytics compare to MUJ Analytics?
faqs.answer: Same platform, similar delivery. MAHE at ₹2,92,000 carries NIRF #3 and IoE. MUJ at ₹1,80,000 costs ₹1,12,000 less. Choose MAHE if the flagship brand specifically matters. Choose MUJ if fee value is the priority.

faqs.question: Is Coursera Plus useful for analytics careers?
faqs.answer: Yes. Coursera Plus gives free access to Google Data Analytics, IBM Data Science, and Python for Data Science certificates. These supplement the MBA syllabus with practical tool certifications that employers recognise.

faqs.question: Can loan applicants get scholarships?
faqs.answer: No. Learners opting for loan or financing are not eligible for additional discounts or offers. This is a critical consideration when comparing effective costs across programmes.

faqs.question: What is the total fee?
faqs.answer: ₹2,92,000 total (₹73,000 per semester). ₹500 application fee. Zero-cost EMI at ₹12,167/month. 8 scholarship categories available (up to 40%). Reconfirm with our counsellor before payment.

chooseIf: NIRF #3 and Institution of Eminence credential matters for consulting or BFSI analytics roles.
You want cross-functional analytics (finance, marketing, HR) rather than narrow data science focus.
Coursera Plus access for Google Data Analytics and IBM Data Science certificates adds value.
You qualify for a scholarship category that reduces the ₹2,92,000 effective fee.
consider: MUJ at ₹1,80,000 offers similar platform delivery for ₹1,12,000 less.
CU at ₹1,65,000 includes PwC co-teaching for analytics content.
Loan financing disqualifies all scholarships, making MAHE one of the most expensive online MBA options.
